requirementCueLines: The MSB accounting option provides a pathway to a great career in accounting with the potential for students to become Certified Public Accountants (CPA).
Once accepted into the Business School, accounting students must complete the following courses for graduation.
5 credits TBUS 400 Business Policy and Strategic Management
Elective credits to bring total to 180
